notes: Security hardening for the optional AI-import and key-server endpoints.
Added rate limiting to the key server and the statement-import endpoint, so they can't be hammered — this is what makes online high-security mode's protection real.
Import endpoints now reject requests with no website origin when an allowed website is configured, closing a curl bypass.
Shared-secret checks are now constant-time, and uploads are verified to actually be PDFs.
Stronger spreadsheet-injection protection on CSV export.
No changes to encryption, your password, or your data — everything stays on your device as before.
